meaning: adj.瘦的,(树等)细长的,(草等)稀疏的,(头发)平直的
examples: She had lank hair and sallow skin.
The old man has lank hair.
A good diet can improve the lank of your life.
Ed Lank is a professor at the University of Maryland, and is leading the investigation.
Crowe is shapeless now, his complexion pasty, his hair long and lank.
